value.stringValue:
{"mentions":[{"name":"Giorgio VENTURA","id":"00558000002Ftm9AAC"},{"name":"Silvia MANZ","id":"00558000002FtpXAAS"},{"name":"Investor Services","id":"0F91i000000PMpRCAW"}],"message":"Dear @[00558000002Ftm9AAC] , @[00558000002FtpXAAS] 

Although for the agreement {![Convention__c].Name} the Sales Region is {![Convention__c].Company_Country__c} we have still applied the Grid {![Convention__c].Grid__r.Name} as based on the agreement terms.

Regards
@[0F91i000000PMpRCAW] "}

Dear @[00558000002Ftm9AAC] , @[00558000002FtpXAAS]
Although for the agreement {!myVariable_current.Name} the Sales Region is {!myVariable_current.Company_Country__c} we have still applied the Grid {!myVariable_current.Grid__r.Name} as based on the agreement terms.
Regards @[0F91i000000PMpRCAW]

{"mentions":[{"name":"Giorgio VENTURA","id":"00558000002Ftm9AAC"},{"name":"Silvia MANZ","id":"00558000002FtpXAAS"},{"name":"Investor Services","id":"0F91i000000PMpRCAW"}],"message":"Dear @[00558000002Ftm9AAC] , @[00558000002FtpXAAS] 

Although for the agreement {![Convention__c].Name} the Sales Region is {![Convention__c].Company_Country__c} we have agreed to applied the requested Grid {![Convention__c].Grid_Request__r.Name} as based on the agreement terms.

Regards
@[0F91i000000PMpRCAW] "}

actionCalls.name: myRule_3_A1
actionCalls.label: Post to Silvia and Giorgio Amendment

value.stringValue:
Dear @[00558000002Ftm9AAC] , @[00558000002FtpXAAS]
Although for the agreement {!myVariable_current.Name} the Sales Region is {!myVariable_current.Company_Country__c} we have agreed to applied the requested Grid {!myVariable_current.Grid_Request__r.Name} as based on the agreement terms.
Regards @[0F91i000000PMpRCAW]

Flow.description: Post chatter when grid is different the RCP Region

value.stringValue:
AND(
AND( NOT( ISBLANK( [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c ) ), OR( [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c.Name = 'L239' , [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c.Name = 'L503', [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c.Name='471', [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c.Name='900' ) ),
AND( NOT( ISBLANK( [Convention__c].Grid__c ) ), NOT( CONTAINS( UPPER([Convention__c].Grid__c.Name),UPPER([Convention__c].Company_Country__c ) ) ) ),
ISCHANGED([Convention__c].Approval_Status__c), [Convention__c].RecordType.Name = 'Intermediary Agreement Request Full', $Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - Investor Services', !$User.BypassProcessBuilders__c
)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_1

value.stringValue:
AND(
AND( NOT( ISBLANK( [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c ) ), OR( [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c.Name = 'L239' , [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c.Name = 'L503', [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c.Name='471', [Convention__c].MasterConvention__c.Name='900' ) ),
AND( NOT( ISBLANK( [Convention__c].Grid__c ) ), NOT( CONTAINS( UPPER([Convention__c].Grid__c.Name),UPPER([Convention__c].Company_Country__c ) ) ) ),
NOT(ISNULL([Convention__c].Grid_Request_Start_Date__c)), ISCHANGED([Convention__c].Amendment_Approval_Status__c ), [Convention__c].RecordType.Name = 'Intermediary Agreement', $Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - Investor Services', !$User.BypassProcessBuilders__c
)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_3

Flow.label: Agreement_PB003_ForeignGrid
